settings.title: Full Colour
settings.summary: All-over colour to cover greys or change your shade, mixed fresh for you.
settings.description:
We start with a strand test and a chat about the tone you are after, then mix the colour to match. If you are covering greys or moving to a new shade, the colour is blended fresh for your hair rather than poured from a stock bottle.

What is included

The price covers application, processing time, and a wash and dry afterwards. We apply the colour evenly from root to tip, time it carefully, then rinse and finish so you can see the true result before you leave.

  • A strand test and a tone consultation
  • Full-head application and processing
  • A wash and blow-dry to finish

During processing you can relax with a drink while the colour develops, and we check it as it goes rather than leaving it to a timer alone. The whole appointment usually takes a couple of hours, depending on your length and the change you want.

Bigger changes and aftercare

For a big change from your natural shade we may suggest booking a longer slot, and we will tell you that before you commit so there are no surprises. Some changes are best done over more than one visit to keep the hair in good condition, and we will be honest about that.

To keep the colour looking fresh, we recommend a colour-safe shampoo and washing in cooler water. If you have boxed colour or henna in your hair already, let us know at booking, since it can affect how the new colour takes.
